description_for_human: Solana DeFi intelligence agent. Scans for arbitrage windows, high-momentum tokens, alpha signals, and performs smart contract security audits.
description_for_model: PocketChange Protocol provides real-time Solana DeFi analytics. Use it to: scan for arb opportunities, find trending tokens, detect alpha signals from on-chain + social data, and audit Solana/TypeScript code for vulnerabilities.
